user_story: As a Manager, I want to create a new requisition, so that I can initiate hiring for an open position
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Requisition List screen; When I click Create requisition and complete the required details; Then a new requisition is created and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all requisitions with RRF id, department, work location, position, number of vacancies and hiring type, so that I can manage open hiring requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Requisition List screen; When the list loads; Then each requisition shows RRF id, created by, department, work location, position, number of vacancies, hiring as, created date, closing date and status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter requisitions by status using the In Progress, Closed, Withdrawn, Rejected and All tabs, so that I can focus on requisitions at a particular stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Requisition List screen; When I click a status tab such as In Progress (30); Then only requisitions in that status are listed with a matching count

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the hiring type (New Join or Replacement) for each requisition, so that I understand the reason for the vacancy
acceptance_criteria: Given requisitions are listed; When I view the Hiring as column; Then each requisition shows whether it is a New Join or Replacement

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to track requisition approval status and approver, so that I know whether a requisition is approved and by whom
acceptance_criteria: Given a requisition has been actioned; When I view its Status column; Then the approval state and approver name are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh and page through the requisition list, so that I can review all requisitions with up-to-date data
acceptance_criteria: Given the requisition list spans multiple pages; When I click Refresh or a page number; Then the list reloads and shows the requested page
